title: Project frontmatter
description: Schema for the YAML frontmatter at the top of a project's PROJECT.md file (harness mode).

id.description: Lowercase, hyphen-separated project identifier. Must match the folder name under projects/ and the projectId in a consuming repo's .praxis/config.json.

status.description: Lifecycle status from the closed set. Never invented; see projects/projects-index.md.
